latHint: Think idioms and something pleasant to hear.
pivHint: SOUL in this command means your innermost self - love God with all of it. But SOUL is also used to name a whole genre of an industry born out of gospel and blues.
winText: You found it. Love God with all your SOUL, and SOUL also gave its name to a genre of MUSIC born from gospel roots. Same word, different verse entirely.
lossText: The word was MUSIC. SOUL was the pivot - your innermost self in Deuteronomy, and the genre of MUSIC that shares its name.
votdVerse: Love the LORD your God with all your heart and with all your soul and with all your strength.
passageText: Hear, O Israel: The LORD our God, the LORD is one. Love the LORD your God with all your heart and with all your soul and with all your strength. These commandments that I give you today are to be on your hearts. Impress them on your children. Talk about them when you sit at home and when you walk along the road, when you lie down and when you get up.
